arxiv_papers.title: Regional Climate Model Emulation with Diffusion Approaches: What is the Added Value of Generative Machine Learning?
arxiv_papers.snippet: Emulators provide a cost-effective alternative to regional climate models (RCMs) by capturing their dynamical downscaling function. podcast: [How to feng shui your fridge — and other happy climate hacks | Jiaying Zhao (re-release)] Is it possible for taking action on climate change to make you feel happy? Behavioral scientist Jiaying Zhao believes that's the only way we'll create lasting, sustainable change. From treat meals to feng shui fridges, she offers eight life hacks to lower your carbon emissions while increasing your joy and fulfillment. Hosted on Acast.
